title: fix(enter): drop WeChat Pay from payment banner
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes "WeChat Pay" from the local-payment-methods pinned banner
- WeChat Pay is not enabled on the live Stripe PMC (only Alipay is)

gist.headline: Banner accuracy check
gist.blurb: Cleaned up the payment methods banner to accurately reflect our supported options. Alipay is still good to go!
gist.summary: Removed WeChat Pay from the local payment methods banner, as it is not currently enabled on the live Stripe configuration.
gist.impact: Users will no longer see WeChat Pay listed as an available payment option, preventing confusion at checkout.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a sign painter, updating a shop banner to be accurate. The robot companion helps by holding the paint.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting over a small wooden shop sign. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a bucket of lime green (#ecf874) paint. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting over a small wooden shop sign. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a bucket of lime green (#ecf874) paint. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
